'''borahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetable|vegetable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetable|vegetable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| borahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:borahithi|borahithi]] || [[word:borahiji|borahiji]] || [[word:borahishi|borahishi]] || [[word:borahiki|borahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:borahuthuthu|borahuthuthu]] || [[word:borahujuju|borahujuju]] || [[word:borahushushu|borahushushu]] || [[word:borahukuku|borahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:borahuthu|borahuthu]] || [[word:borahuju|borahuju]] || [[word:borahushu|borahushu]] || [[word:borahuku|borahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:borahufthuf|borahufthuf]] || [[word:borahufjuf|borahufjuf]] || [[word:borahufshuf|borahufshuf]] || [[word:borahufkuf|borahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:borahethe|borahethe]] || [[word:boraheje|boraheje]] || [[word:boraheshe|boraheshe]] || [[word:boraheke|boraheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:borahothotho|borahothotho]] || [[word:borahojojo|borahojojo]] || [[word:borahoshosho|borahoshosho]] || [[word:borahokoko|borahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:borahotho|borahotho]] || [[word:borahojo|borahojo]] || [[word:borahosho|borahosho]] || [[word:borahoko|borahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:borahofthof|borahofthof]] || [[word:borahofjof|borahofjof]] || [[word:borahofshof|borahofshof]] || [[word:borahofkof|borahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:borahÃŸfthÃŸf|borahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfjÃŸf|borahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfshÃŸf|borahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfkÃŸf|borahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:borahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|borahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|borahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|borahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|borahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:borahÃŸfthÃŸf|borahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfjÃŸf|borahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfshÃŸf|borahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfkÃŸf|borahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:borahÃŸfthÃŸf|borahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfjÃŸf|borahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfshÃŸf|borahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:borahÃŸfkÃŸf|borahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:borahÃḊthÃḊ|borahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:borahÃḊjÃḊ|borahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:borahÃḊshÃḊ|borahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:borahÃḊkÃḊ|borahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:borahathatha|borahathatha]] || [[word:borahajaja|borahajaja]] || [[word:borahashasha|borahashasha]] || [[word:borahakaka|borahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:borahatha|borahatha]] || [[word:borahaja|borahaja]] || [[word:borahasha|borahasha]] || [[word:borahaka|borahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:borahafthaf|borahafthaf]] || [[word:borahafjaf|borahafjaf]] || [[word:borahafshaf|borahafshaf]] || [[word:borahafkaf|borahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:borahasha|borahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:borahshÃḋsha|borahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borahrosha|borahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borahmusha|borahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:borahyasha|borahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborahnkshÃḋsha|goborahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborahnkrosha|goborahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborahnkmusha|goborahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborahnkyasha|goborahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:borarahasha|borarahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:borarahshÃḋsha|borarahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borarahrosha|borarahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borarahmusha|borarahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:borarahyasha|borarahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborarahnkshÃḋsha|goborarahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborarahnkrosha|goborarahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborarahnkmusha|goborarahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborarahnkyasha|goborarahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:berÃḊhasha|berÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:berÃḊhshÃḋsha|berÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:berÃḊhrosha|berÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:berÃḊhmusha|berÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:berÃḊhyasha|berÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goberÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|goberÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goberÃḊhnkrosha|goberÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goberÃḊhnkmusha|goberÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goberÃḊhnkyasha|goberÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:borfahasha|borfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:borfahshÃḋsha|borfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borfahrosha|borfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borfahmusha|borfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:borfahyasha|borfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborfahnkshÃḋsha|goborfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborfahnkrosha|goborfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborfahnkmusha|goborfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborfahnkyasha|goborfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
